FAILED Lib/test/test_urllib2.py::HandlerTests::test_http_default_headers

================================ FAILURES ===================================
___________ HandlerTests::test_http_default_headers ____________

Lib/test/test_urllib2.py:312: in test_http_default_headers
    assert 'Content-Type' in response.headers
AssertionError: 'Content-Type' not in {'Accept-Encoding': 'identity'}

Note: This assertion passed in Python 3.11. The Content-Type header was
removed from default requests in the urllib refactor introduced in 3.12.0a4.
Previously the default header set included Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded.
